messages.content: Hey howâs it been going?! Was wondering if you had some availability this week to go over some creators and also setup a call or group chat with my team!

I can as long as I get permission from them. Each has a contract that explicitly says I need to ask before. But I can also walk you through the backends of the pages and how their accounts are performing etc. We specializes specifically in creators who are open to OFTV, YouTube, and use social media. Would love to show you a bit more! I can setup a google meet sometime and go over who and how we are representing and managing the accounts . Itâs an extremely organized system and we have in house reel editing, internal social media managers, in house OFTV and YouTube editing, as well as a really well managed and organized chat team that youâre able to stay in constant communication with.
Are you able to give me the names of some of the creators youâre currently managing?

Hey! Love the content! I actually manage some of the top creators on OF and Telegram (mostly within the top 1% and some in the top .01%)! We specialize in 360 marketing and work with a select group of niche creators and other creators we know we can scale. What are you doing for marketing right now? We manage a bunch of platforms and have many systems in place for our creators, which most agencies donât do. This includes full chat team and managers, IG, Reddit, X, Telgram and we do OFTV creation and content houses every month or two. Would love to talk about you joining our team. You have a great page and I think we could scale you a lot. Plus we have a competitive commission scale. Let me know if you want to setup a phone call or group chat with my team to discuss what we can do! We have all female account management as well and our teams based between Palm Beach and LA! Let me know if you have any questions. Would love to talk more!
